narrative:
Woodmere-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 499 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 46.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 43.5 percentage points.
